name: MSI B650 GAMING PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E (B650GPWIFI)
